tasks.subject: Task 1: LayerItem model
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `lib/models/layer_item.dart` with the sealed class hierarchy.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/models/layer_item.dart`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `LayerItem` sealed class with `LayerLeaf` and `LayerGroup` subtypes
- [ ] Both have `copyWith`; `LayerGroup` has a `create` factory
- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes

**Verify:** `flutter analyze lib/models/layer_item.dart` → no issues

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/models/layer_item.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter analyze lib/models/layer_item.dart", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LayerItem sealed class", "LayerLeaf and LayerGroup with copyWith", "LayerGroup.create factory", "flutter analyze passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: CrossStitchPattern + serialization
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace stored `layers` field with `layerItems`, add flattening `layers` getter and `mapLayers` helper, update YAML read/write, fix format_service.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/models/pattern.dart`
- Modify: `lib/services/file_service.dart`
- Modify: `lib/services/format_service.dart`

**Verify:** Open existing `.stitchx` — layers appear, drawing works

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/models/pattern.dart", "lib/services/file_service.dart", "lib/services/format_service.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter analyze", "acceptanceCriteria": ["layerItems replaces layers field", "layers getter flattens with groupVisible", "mapLayers helper", "migration from layers: key", "layerItems: written to file"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: EditorProvider layer + group operations
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update all layer operations to work through `layerItems`, add all group operations.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/providers/editor_provider.dart`

**Verify:** Hot-restart — add/delete/move/merge layers all work as before

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/providers/editor_provider.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter analyze", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all layer ops work with layerItems", "addLayer inserts in group when active layer is grouped", "all 10 group ops implemented", "no copyWith(layers:) remaining"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Layers panel UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite LayersPanel to render groups with collapse/expand, indented layer rows, and a New Group button.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/widgets/layers_panel.dart`

**Verify:** Run app — create group, collapse, toggle visibility, ungroup, delete with confirmation

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/widgets/layers_panel.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter analyze", "acceptanceCriteria": ["group header row with chevron/eye/name/menu", "collapse hides layers", "12px indent for grouped layers", "new group button works", "delete group confirmation", "move out of group", "save/reload persists groups"]}
```
